roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
PROBATION TRANSFER TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY SENT
DEFT MOT TO CONTINUE PRELIM HRG FILED

/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/ALG:INFLICTION OF GREAT BODILY INJURY PURSUANT TO PC 12022,7(A)/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:03-02-12/TWS/REMA/ARBUCKLE/SAORD/SA1:NORMAN C,/SAORD3/OR/X:1 YEAR HAMMER/X:DEFENDANT AGRESS TO A WAIVER OF 67 DAYS OF CUSTODY CREDIT ONLY FOR THE PURPOSE OF IMPOSING THE 1 YEAR HAMMER, IF NECESSARY/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:(PETITION FOR ORDER COMPELLING TESTIMONY AND ORDER FOR USE IMMUNITY PURSUANT TO 1324PC ARE FILED IN OPEN COURT AND ARE TOBE PLACED UNDER SEAL)/ /WIT SWORN:NORMAND C, (A MINOR, REPRESENTED BY CONFLICT COUNSEL LISA DEWBERRY)/WIT SWORN:INSPECTOR UNA BAILEY, SFPD/EXHMA:PEO1, 2, & 3) PHOTOS/EXHMA:DEF A) STREET DIAGRAM/HTA1:1, 2, & 3/X:THE COURTFINDS THE ALLEGATIONS LISTED IN THE COMPLAINT TO BE TRUE/BAIL:300,000/DEFTCUST3/TWA/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD: FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 12-05-11/987,2/BAIL:300,000/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:APD PC1203,9 TRANSFER (FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY)/DAWT/MO GRTD/X:ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAW/DEFTARR/NTW/LD: FOR TRIAL IS03-05-12/987,2/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND TRIAL/DOP/
